scripts.build: shx rm -rf dist && npm run lint && tsc --project tsconfig.prod.json && npm run build:copy-static && npm run build:make-db
scripts.build:copy-static: shx mkdir -p dist/public dist/views && shx cp -r src/public/* dist/public && shx cp -r src/views/* dist/views
scripts.build:make-db: shx mkdir -p dist/repos/common && shx touch dist/repos/common/database.json && echo "{}" > dist/repos/common/database.json
